seoTitle: Cape Tribulation vs Captain Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cape Tribulation and Captain Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cape Tribulation vs Captain Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cape Tribulation and Captain Creek.
heading: Cape Tribulation vs Captain Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cape Tribulation, Queensland and Captain Creek, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cape Tribulation has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Captain Creek (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cape Tribulation or Captain Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cape Tribulation has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Captain Creek scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cape Tribulation scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Captain Creek scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cape Tribulation or Captain Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cape Tribulation has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
